nodes.context: Primarily Afro-Caribbean street gang in Manchester, UK, controlling East Side of Alexandra Park estate in Moss Side.
Larger and more established gang in Manchester that levied 'tax' on Moss Side dealers.
Gang in Moss Side, rival of Doddington, aligned with Cheetham Hill Gang and Westside Gooch faction.
Predecessor of Doddington gang, emerged in 1980s around Pepperhill pub.
Off-shoot of Doddington gang formed by Thomas Pitt, aligned with Gooch gang.
Junior faction of Doddington gang from Longsight and Ardwick areas.
Junior faction spawned from Doddington gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Originating from the Pepperhill Crew, the gang was named after its headquarters in Dodington Close
edges.context: Doddington gang originated from the Pepperhill Mob.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang became rivals of the Cheetham Hill Gang and the Gooch Close Gang during the late 1980s and early 1990s
edges.context: Doddington gang was rival of Cheetham Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang became rivals of the Cheetham Hill Gang and the Gooch Close Gang during the late 1980s and early 1990s
edges.context: Doddington gang was rival of Gooch Close Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pepperhill Mob, rich and well armed despite their youth, fought back. The two gangs vied with each other in stabbings, tit-for-tat shootings and murder
edges.context: Pepperhill Mob and Cheetham Hill Gang were in violent conflict over drug territory.

edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1990s, the Pepperhill/Doddington group developed a fierce rivalry with the Gooch Close Gang.
edges.context: Doddington gang had a fierce rivalry with Gooch Close Gang over drug trade.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch, aligned with the Cheetham Hill Gang and the larger Westside Gooch faction, started a violent turf war
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang was aligned with Cheetham Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pit Bull Crew paradoxically aligned itself with the Gooch gang, deepening the violent divisions not only between Doddington and Gooch but within Doddington's ranks itself.
edges.context: Pit Bull Crew was a rival off-shoot of Doddington that aligned with Gooch.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pit Bull Crew paradoxically aligned itself with the Gooch gang
edges.context: Pit Bull Crew aligned with Gooch gang.

edges.evidence_quote: A rival off-shoot of the Doddington gang, the Longsight Crew (composed of younger Doddington members from the Longsight and Ardwick areas) attempted to sell in the areas occupied by the Pit Bull Crew, resulting in yet another turf war.
edges.context: Longsight Crew was a rival off-shoot of Doddington gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the Moss Side Bloods
edges.context: Moss Side Bloods is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.

edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the ... Haydock Close Crew
edges.context: Haydock Close Crew is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.

edges.evidence_quote: Doddington gave rise to the ... Portuguese Mafia
edges.context: Portuguese Mafia is a junior faction spawned from Doddington.

edges.evidence_quote: Gooch formed alliances with splinter groups including the Pit Bull Crew, Rusholme Crips, Fallowfield Mandem/Mad Dogs, Old Trafford Cripz, and Longsight Street Soldiers
edges.context: Gooch gang allied with Rusholme Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: Gooch formed alliances with splinter groups including the Pit Bull Crew, Rusholme Crips, Fallowfield Mandem/Mad Dogs, Old Trafford Cripz, and Longsight Street Soldiers
edges.context: Gooch gang allied with Fallowfield Mandem.

edges.evidence_quote: Gooch formed alliances with splinter groups including the Pit Bull Crew, Rusholme Crips, Fallowfield Mandem/Mad Dogs, Old Trafford Cripz, and Longsight Street Soldiers
edges.context: Gooch gang allied with Old Trafford Cripz.

edges.evidence_quote: Gooch formed alliances with splinter groups including the Pit Bull Crew, Rusholme Crips, Fallowfield Mandem/Mad Dogs, Old Trafford Cripz, and Longsight Street Soldiers
edges.context: Gooch gang allied with Longsight Street Soldiers.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2004, members of the Gooch gang and Longsight Crew fought each other in the Manchester Royal Infirmary.
edges.context: Gooch gang and Longsight Crew fought each other.
